title: TillStopMode Property
description: Sets or returns the stop method when trigger conditions are met when the force trigger is used for Till.
examples:
Function TillStopModeTest
    FSet FT1.Fz_Enabled, True
    FSet FT1.Fz_Levels, -5, 5
    FSet FT1.TillStopMode, FG_SOFT_STOP

FSet FS1.Reset
    Till FT1
    Move Here -Z(100) Till
Fend
